activities.name: Green Lake Inner
activities.description: I think I stopped once. Head/chest cold all this week.

activities.name: 900' vertical treadmill
activities.description: Couldn't quite stick it out for 1000. Too hot.

activities.name: Easy treadmill hills
activities.description: 3.6 miles / 30 mins and 350', followed by the fastest  mile with a 100' I could do

activities.name: 1000' vertical
activities.description: 40 mins on a variable hill course, followed by a few minutes to get up to 1000' vertical.

activities.name: Montlake Meander
activities.description: With Steve Trautman. Took a couple of breathers

activities.name: Phinney Fremont
activities.description: I had my watch off for a mile down Phinney. It's a 5-miler, not a 4 miler.

activities.name: Foothills for 1000 vertical
activities.description: Overheated as usual. 2.5 mins break in front of the fans.

activities.name: Walk back to the car
activities.description: Didn't have enough in my stomach to continue the run

activities.name: 750 vert treadmill
activities.description: Used basic "hill" profile at difficulty level 10 (out of 20). Varied pace between 8:40/mile and 9:45

activities.name: 500' vertical in intervals and more
activities.description: 1 mile in intervals; then 1500m rowing, then 1/2 mile run

activities.name: Green Lake Inner clockwise 5K
activities.description: Overran the loop to make it to 5K.

activities.name: Too much pizza during the game.
activities.description: Had to stop after 2.5 miles

activities.name: Foothills Run on Treadmill
activities.description: Level 10, 1000' of elevation gain.

activities.name: treadmill, 860' vertical
activities.description: Foothills run. Level 10 for most of it, but incline locked at 2.5% for last mile and a half.

activities.name: 10-miler to the arboretum
activities.description: With Herve, Steve, and Tamara. The smell of Daphne was pungent even though we never saw any!

activities.name: Foothills run on treadmill (650 vert)
activities.description: 3 miles on the treadmill + 1500m on the erg.

activities.name: Treadmill foothills (680 vertical)
activities.description: 5 miles at level 8 on "foothills" profile

activities.name: Hybrid Run/Row
activities.description: 2.5 mile run with 300' gain + 2000m row in a time of 9:20

activities.name: 4x Tangletown hill
activities.description: 1 minute rest between intervals.

activities.name: 70th St Traverse & Burke Gilman
activities.description: With Steve and Herve. Was hoping to complete the loop, but the feet & legs had other plans.

activities.name: Treadmill + Erg
activities.description: 3 miles on treadmill in 24:40, followed by 1500m on erg in 6:30. Nicely buggered at the end of it.

activities.name: 1000' vert + 1000m erg
activities.description: 21:50 (I think) on the hike up at 15%, followed by 2 x 500m

activities.name: Fryman Canyon Loop and a Half
activities.description: Chris and Steve walked it. I ran a loop anticlockwise, then headed clockwise back up past George Clooney's house before turning around.

activities.name: Big Loop of Medina
activities.description: I like the distance and the fact that there's nearly 500' of climbing. Took a few breaks though.

activities.name: Green Lake Inner clockwise
activities.description: 1 stop

activities.name: Grand Ridge with Steve T
activities.description: Beautiful day; beautiful trail. Thanks Tracy!

activities.name: 5000m on the erg
activities.description: Call it 3 miles worth of effort.

activities.name: Two Phinneys anti-clockwise
activities.description: Legs still a little weak after last Sunday's adventure I guess.

activities.name: hills + erg
activities.description: 3 miles with 600' of climbing, followed by a mile on the erg at a 2:15/500m pace

activities.name: Stevens Snowshoe with Mino
activities.description: Beautiful day and just enough snow to have a great time.

activities.name: Truncated Medina Run
activities.description: Ran out of energy to follow the peninsula around. Looks a bit like an event ticket...

activities.name: 3/5 of a Medina Run
activities.description: Ran out of energy....

activities.name: Quick March back to the car
activities.description: Walking at 13 min/mile is tough on the hips!

activities.name: Discovery Park Fun with Herve
activities.description: I huffed, and I puffed, but Herve sailed through the hills. That young fellow is fit!

activities.name: 1 mile uphill + 3 on the erg
activities.description: A mile at the 9 min pace with increasing angle. 160' climbed in total. Next time I'll shoot for 200'. Then 5000m on the erg in a tad under 23 mins.

activities.name: Medina Loop
activities.description: Time was good, but I stopped more than usual.

activities.name: 1 mile erg + 4 miles/600' run
activities.description:
3 x 500m intervals on the erg under 2:10, 2:05, and 2:00.

4 hilly miles on the treadmill, total of 580 vertical ft at the 9 minute pace.

activities.name: On the Wilamette riverfront with Grace
Grace's first trail run
activities.description: A bit slippery, but Grace did great. She could be a strong hill runner if she wants to be.

activities.name: Long Medina Run
activities.description: Long and (reasonably) slow is good.

activities.name: Short Medina Loop
activities.description: Not as fast as it looks. Lots of stops.

activities.name: Rattlesnake Ridge, out and back
activities.description: First time, and will definitely do it again. Great run with Steve and Herve. We went as far as east peak, which I think is the high point.

activities.name: 5k on the Erg
activities.description: Cross training

activities.name: 4 miles, 600'
activities.description: Treadmill. "Cascades" profile

activities.name: 2 mile run; 2 mile walk
activities.description: Didn't eat right -- got low blood sugar along the way. Lesson learned to stay away from the protein bars before a run

activities.name: Medina Long Loop, no stops
activities.description: Time looks slow, but actually it was true: no pausing the watch to catch my breath as I always previously did.

activities.name: 7-miler with Herve
activities.description: Magnusson Park was pretty. Too many bikes on the BG though.

activities.name: Around the waters
activities.description: With Herve (and Steve for some of it). My training for the June 14th Tunnel Marathon told me I needed to do 15 miles today, so this included an extra treat!

activities.name: 6x500m erg + 1000' vertical hike
activities.description: Ramped erg intervals from 2:25 to 1:58.

activities.name: Not my finest hour
activities.description: Was supposed to be 5 miles. Don't try Oculus before a run!

activities.name: Half marathon? Half mile more like it.
activities.description: I wasn't watching my footing, and stuck a buried metal shank in the road shoulder. Went hands/face first into the gravel. Lots of abrasions, but not other injuries thankfully.

activities.name: Around Lake Union with David Midgley
activities.description: Thanks David!

activities.name: Out and back from the finish of the Tunnel Marathon
activities.description: With Herve, who ran two miles further and a good measure faster. Goodonya Herve!

activities.name: 5000m on the erg
activities.description: Considering this the equivalent of a 2.5 mile run. I think this is my fastest 5000m time.

activities.name: Short Medina Loop
activities.description: Still cheating with a few stops, but felt good given Sunday's big run

activities.name: 1000' vertical, 5 miles and 1 chinup
activities.description: Jay Turley: note the 1 chin up. Your move sir.

activities.name: Lost for Lunch
activities.description: After working in downtown Bellevue for the last 5 years, this is the first time I've explored Wilberton Hill and environs. And yes, I got a bit lost coming back.

activities.name: Greek Lake Outside Track, clockwise
activities.description: Thought I was going to do two laps, but the idea fades when you run past your house at the halfway point...

activities.name: To Bothel and Back
activities.description: with Herve. As usual, my legs knew when I had two miles remaining and packed it in. Lots of walking near the end. I must find a way to fool them!

activities.name: Fun in the gym
activities.description: 2000m on the erg, 1000m on the erg, 5 minutes of skipping; 500 vertical feet if treadmill hiking.

activities.name: Mt Baldy Loop
activities.description: And yes, I took the chairlift down, as you can see from the straight line. Fantastic place, but the 10,000' altitude took it out of me nicely!

activities.name: Long Medina Loop
activities.description: Lots of stops unfortunately!

activities.name: Wet and Wandering
activities.description: Nice downpour as I explored some of the quieter streets of Medina near my usual route.

activities.name: treadmill
activities.description: 400-500 feet of climbing

activities.name: Too hot to run 20 miles
activities.description: Somehow Herve managed it, but I'm not as tough as he is!

activities.name: Treadmill + erg
activities.description: Feeling a little light-headed

activities.name: First day at Studio A.
activities.description: Low blood sugar after 2 miles.

activities.name: Phinney Fremont
activities.description: Lots of walking. Still feeling crappy.

activities.name: Both Lakes
activities.description: Felt better than I expected!

activities.name: Run Home-ish
activities.description: Bus across the bridge, and bonked for lack of energy a mile or two from home, but this is definitely a fun way to end the day!

activities.name: To Mathews beach and back with Mino and Grace
activities.description: Really fun to have Grace get into running. She ran home after this!

activities.name: Cut down guitar run
activities.description: ran out of energy.... lots of stops

activities.name: Early morning electric guitar run
activities.description: Not too bad.

activities.name: Walk, then run, back up Interlaken
Out and back on the Snoq Valley / Iron Horse
activities.description: Did it by myself, and felt pretty good until about the 18 mile mark. Then -- not so good.

activities.name: Phinney Fremont
activities.description: This might be my fastest time on this run.

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: Went out too fast, had to stop a few times.

activities.name: Hot and Hilly Run to a Ballard Brunch
activities.description: Note to self: see if there is a shorter way to get from Green Lake to Ballard.

activities.name: Not even a lap of Green Lake
activities.description: Maybe a virus?

activities.name: kayak on Whidbey Island
activities.description: For Steve Trautman's surprise birthday. Very fun

activities.name: Light at the End of the Tunnel Marathon
activities.description: My first marathon. As in my training runs, I hit a bit of a wall at about 18 miles and slowed dramatically after that. Great experience though!

activities.name: Aerobic 3-miler
activities.description: Been reading about the benefits of training below the aerobic threshold. Haven't measured mine, but it's probably about 130 bpm, so that's what I stayed under.

activities.name: Aerobic Guitar
activities.description: Keeping my heart rate in the aerobic zone for the entire run feels unnatural but is apparently a good training technique. We shall see.

activities.name: Aerobic run for a coffee
activities.description: Met Chris at the Starbucks Roastery.. Once again kept heart rate under 135.

activities.name: Lost in the Lowlands of Tiger Mountain
activities.description: My first run with Always Running, and I took a wrong turn on my 2nd lap! Turned 4 miles into 6!

activities.name: Tangletown Hilly 4-miler
activities.description: Heart rate monitor is on the blink. And I stopped a lot. Felt like a pretty good run, but the watch didn't agree

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: University Loop
activities.description: Doing what coach Tony said: Even pace throughout, including the hill.

activities.name: Lake Hike with Chris, Sonja, GT, and SD
activities.description: Fun morning with the ladies

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: Back to Ollalie Lake
activities.description: the best part about this was that I had the lake to myself and swam in it at 7:30pm before running back. Invigorating.

activities.name: Goldmyer Loop...
activities.description: Up until when my watch's battery died. Full GPX coming soon.

activities.name: Naches Peak Loop Hike
activities.description: with Chris

activities.name: Reflection Lake Hike
activities.description: with Chris

activities.name: Med,Med,Hard
activities.description: Made up my own activity. 2 miles at medium effort, and a final 3rd mile at close to full effort.

activities.name: Always Running: 3 miles very easy
activities.description: Keeping heart rate below 140.

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: 8 miler
activities.description: per Tony's instructions. 2 miles @ 9:30, 4 @ 8:45, 2 @ 9:30. Only problem was that I had to stop along the way...

activities.name: Nicely lost in Bridle Trails
activities.description: I thought I was only lost on my 2nd lap, but now that I look at it, my first lap wasn't a full one either. No worries, it's a great place and I will be back!

activities.name: AlwaysRunning with Tony
activities.description: Plan was for 1 mile warm up, 2 miles at 8:00, and 1 mile warm down. I didn't complete the 2 fast miles. Will next time.

activities.name: Walk to Bus. There it is! Run.
AlwaysRunning.Half marathon, half uphill
activities.description: First half was flat, but the 2nd half was mostly uphill. Haven't run this far in 6 weeks, so I'm happy with this effort..

activities.name: 130 bpm
activities.description: Keeping the heart rate down to 130

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: 3x1mile intervals with a slow mile in between.
activities.description: The plan was 9:30,7:30,9:30,7:30,9:30,7:30,9:30 which I came very close to hitting. Very hard. But good.

activities.name: 135 bpm
activities.description: Though I went up into the 140s on a few of the hills.

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: 10 miles at 8:45
activities.description: Keeping my heart rate in the 140s. Pretty good, but it was downhill of course.

activities.name: 5 Phinney Ridges
activities.description: Was shooting for 1000' and not walking on any of the hills. Close enough on the former, not so much on the later

activities.name: Track work with Tony
activities.description: 3x800m at the 7min pace

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: 13-miler at 9:30
activities.description: The apparent mountain in the middle is a fiction. Some DEM service screwed up I think. Kept heart rate in the 140s for almost all of the 2nd half

activities.name: Failure to complete
activities.description: Was supposed to do 2 miles at 8 min pace, but felt crappy after 1. Walked then ran home.

activities.name: 3 Phinneys -- no walking
activities.description: First time ever completing a loop like this without walking or pausing at all. Slow time, but its a start.

activities.name: 4x800m intervals with Tony
activities.description: Managed to run them at the desired pace of 3:30

activities.name: AlwaysRunning: Easy-moderate 3
activities.description: Couldn't find the heart rate monitor. Guess I averaged 140.

activities.name: Glacier Peak Approach
activities.description: Sauk River road to valley after White Pass

activities.name: Glacier Peak
activities.description: I turned around at 8,000' where the glacier travel starts

activities.name: Glacier Peak hike-out
activities.description: Blisters

activities.name: First run in 10 days.
activities.description: Was recovering from foot problems after the Glacier Peak climb. Not so pretty.

activities.name: Two Phinneys Clockwise (NO PAUSES)
activities.description: Standard run, but I always used to stop and so appeared to go faster.

activities.name: Heart rate 140
activities.description: Average was less, but was keeping it under that except on the hills.

activities.name: To the mountains
activities.description: But not up the mountains. Not enough time and too hot

activities.name: 135 bpm
activities.description: Keeping it (the heart) real(ly low)

activities.name: Climb to Sourdough Lookout
activities.description: Didn't turn my watch on until the top as I knew it wouldn't last the day. 5000' of elevation gain to get to this point.

activities.name: And this was just the descent!
activities.description: The full loop on Sourdough was captured by my friend Steve: https://www.strava.com/activities/385828785

activities.name: Showing Mino Ravenna Park
activities.description: Recovery after that crazy outing on Saturday.

activities.name: 135 bpm recovery
activities.description: but I didn't eat properly and ran out of energy. Walked part of way home.

activities.name: Cheater, not Cheetah
activities.description: Was attempting my standard Tangletown run, but legs and lungs were not quite back to full strength and I stopped a number of times.

activities.name: Always Running team run.
activities.description: I was supposed to do 10 miles. Not today!

activities.name: Attempted mile intervals
activities.description: Couldn't maintain 7:30 pace for 2nd mile. 2 pauses.

activities.name: Ngong House to Giraffe Center Walk
Walking with an elephant gun
activities.description: to keep the buffalo and lions at bay. With Rulof,  the manager of Naboisho Camp

activities.name: Part of the Stone Town guided walk
Out of Africa
activities.description: First run in more than two weeks. Tried not to overdo it.

activities.name: Circle of Confusion: Return to Bridle Trails.
activities.description: This path makes it look like I knew what I was doing, but I didn't. When I popped out at the NE corner I thought I was at the SE corner!

activities.name: Out of Africa in the rain
activities.description: Went out too fast. hand to stop a couple of times; got dumped on in the last mile.

activities.name: Ravenna Ramble
activities.description: Long and fairly slow. Tried to keep every mile at a constant pace regardless of topography

activities.name: Western part of MSFT 10K
activities.description: Pooped out after 2 miles for lack of food.

activities.name: Exploring the Neighborhood
activities.description: Stop lights to cross the access roads to 520 are slow! Need to change my path to NOT cross 520 so much.

activities.name: Microsoft and the Lake
activities.description: Minimal stopping for traffic lights.

activities.name: Exploring the Microsoft neighborhoods
activities.description: Bonked out due to poor eating at the bottom of the hill.

activities.name: Looks like a molar
activities.description: Less elevation in this one than the 10-miler I used to do around here. Didn't hit the summits of Queen Anne or Cap Hill, but this course is fully runnable by me. Next time try to do it without a handful of stops.

activities.name: Squak Mountain hike with Peter
activities.description: Testing out new watch.

activities.name: Lunch Run
activities.description: Using "smart GPS" which certainly does look like its cutting corners.

activities.name: Run home from work
activities.description: This was really a 10.5 mile run all the way home, excluding the bridge, but Strava got confused so I had to crop it.

activities.name: Climb of Mt Diablo with Dave Anderson
activities.description: This is his standard route. a Few years ago he did it in 2:01 -- which is a good goal for me to shoot for. It will be tough!

activities.name: Descent from Mt Diablo with Dave Anderson
To Redmond, to Redmond to buy a fat pig
Trail to Redmond; Streets back
activities.description: Still trying to work out how to run > 4 miles without having to cross major traffic lights. 3 mins total pause.

activities.name: You can't get there from here
Not enough juice to get up the 520 hill
Microsoft and the Hill
activities.description: Fast pace, but stopped a few times.

activities.name: Not exactly 12 miles
activities.description: Grand plans for a long run started with a loop of Green Lake, but I somehow talked myself into bailing after 2

activities.name: Looping north to the River
activities.description: Lots of pauses though

activities.name: Rough Diamond
activities.description: My first time coming up BelRed Road -- pretty good place to practice a sustained, if gentle, hill.

activities.name: Surf and Turf
activities.description: A soggy horse-manure-scented mile bracketed by long suburban streets

activities.name: Out of Africa again
activities.description: Cold. Slightly sore right leg

activities.name: Don't eat Phad Thai for lunch
Lunch Run
activities.description: Windy -- feeling a little sore, not sure why. Stopped a fair bit.

activities.name: Bigger than a molar
activities.description: I extended my new favorite run a little this morning. Rain was falling continuously. Oh the joys of running in a Seattle winter.

activities.name: Birthday Run
activities.description: Had planned to do a long one with friends, but we had to postpone. Will try for Jan.

activities.name: Quarter Pizza
activities.description: Only had time for 3 miles today

activities.name: Dark, wet, and Fumy
activities.description: Ahh... The joys of running in Redmond in December.

activities.name: Xmas eve in Africa
activities.description: With a bit of a head cold

activities.name: Kachess Snowshoe for 10
activities.description: A great outing with the Gaylords, Trautman and other  friends
